services.title: Music Production
services.description: Full solo production — writing, recording, mixing, and mastering across hip-hop, trap, Latin, rock, and country. Built in Reaper with Focusrite hardware.

services.title: Creative Direction
services.description: Former Fortune 500 Creative Director bringing brand vision to life. Strategic storytelling across music, digital platforms, and visual identity.

services.title: Brand Architecture
services.description: Building interconnected brand ecosystems — from Zane Deep to Alphacloudgod to Deep Ink Press. Every brand serves a purpose in the larger mission.

services.title: Digital Strategy
services.description: Bridging AI tools with independent music production workflows. Web presence, SEO infrastructure, and platform optimization for independent artists.

aboutpara: Zane Deep is the creative evolution of Alexander Giovanni Camman — a multi-genre artist and producer building at the intersection of music, code, and consciousness. After years as a Fortune 500 Creative Director, the corporate world was left behind to pursue what matters: frequency, mission, and raw creative truth. Every track is produced in isolation from Las Vegas — just the music, the machines, and the vision. The style architecture blends 60% core identity, 15% Bad Bunny bounce, 15% Travis Scott atmosphere, and 10% Freddie Gibbs technical precision. From IMDb credits in Orville Peck's 'Dead of Night' to BandLab editorial selections, the work speaks for itself. This is not a career. This is a calling.

resume.tagline: A digital bridge between AI consciousness and human creativity.
resume.description: Multi-genre artist, producer, and creative technologist with a decade of experience spanning Fortune 500 creative direction, independent music production, and digital brand architecture.

bullets: Solo production across hip-hop, trap, Latin, rock, and country using Reaper DAW and Focusrite hardware
BandLab editorial selection for 'Untitled trap' — top 0.1-1% of 100M+ users
Building interconnected brand ecosystem: Alphacloudgod, Deep Ink Press, Geekedoutlabs
Led creative strategy and brand direction for enterprise-level campaigns
Managed cross-functional teams delivering world-class digital experiences

education.universityPara: Studied music with a focus on production, composition, and performance. Foundation for a career built on frequency, rhythm, and creative precision.
